Class Media.Format

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.content.Media.Format
Enclosing class:
Media
public static class Media.Format extends Object
Common media formats.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Mark Pollack, Thomas Vitale
